steps.title: Identify the contrast
steps.content: The passage establishes that cheetahs and blue whales were charismatic according to participants' responses, but then contrasts this by stating no animal outranked the tiger. This indicates a shift from listing specific animals to highlighting the tiger's higher ranking.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
A captures this transition of shifting focus and sets up a contrasting idea.

The other options either don’t show any contrast (B, C), introduce an example which isn’t fitting in context (D), or they contradict the flow established.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
